title: Proc alert (icon, standalone)
description: A second-order (talent/passive) ability with ProcChance < 100, used as its OWN icon. Per HUD_DESIGN.md, only use this template when the procced ability has no existing Rotation button to react in place - otherwise use this same opportunity type as a glow_source on a cooldown_tracker_icon instead.
